BattleEffectText.Name: Poise
BattleEffectText.Desc: Gain {0} x 5% chance to Crit. Lose 1 Stack on Crit and at the end of the Scene. Crits increase the final roll value by x1.2.

BattleEffectText.Name: Rupture
BattleEffectText.Desc: Take bonus damage when hit equal to {0}. Stack reduces by 1/3rd when hit.

BattleEffectText.Name: Shin (心) - Gray Cinderella
BattleEffectText.Desc: At the start of the Scene, gain Damage Up equal to stack. Gain a Shield equal to 6% of Max HP per stack (3% for Boss).

BattleEffectText.Name: Mang (望) - Gray Cinderella
BattleEffectText.Desc: At the start of the Scene, gain 7% Healing effectiveness, +1 Dice Power for every 4 Haste, and +1 Dice Max for every 3 Speed difference per stack.

BattleEffectText.Name: Let My Name Rock Earth
BattleEffectText.Desc: Inflict 2 Bind to all enemies next Scene. Attacking an enemy with a Speed difference of 5 or higher inflicts 1 Feeble on Clash Win (up to 5 times per Scene).

BattleEffectText.Name: Let My Name Shake Heaven and Earth
BattleEffectText.Desc: Inflict 3 Bind to all enemies next Scene. Attacking an enemy with a Speed difference of 5 or higher inflicts 1~2 Feeble and Fragile on Clash Win (up to 8 times per Scene). If enemy Bind sum is 15+, inflict half of the Feeble total to all enemies next Scene.

BattleEffectText.Name: Craving Monster
BattleEffectText.Desc: On using a Combat Page, restore 1 Light. [On Hit] If the target is Staggered, recover 8% of missing HP (4% for Boss).

BattleEffectText.Name: Hungry Monster
BattleEffectText.Desc: On using a Combat Page, restore 1-2 Light. All Dice on this character gain +1 Max value. [On Hit] If the target is Staggered, recover 12% of missing HP (6% for Boss).

BattleEffectText.Name: Starved Monster
BattleEffectText.Desc: On using a Combat Page, restore 1-3 Light and have a 33% chance to draw 1 Page. All Dice on this character gain +1 Min and +2 Max value. [On Hit] If the target is Staggered, recover 16% of missing HP (8% for Boss). (If HP recovers above 50%, Monster self-damage is multiplied by 3x (2x for Boss) for 3 Scenes.)

BattleEffectText.Name: The Gray Cinderella
BattleEffectText.Desc: At the start of the Scene, when this unit has not taken any damage to their HP the previous Scene, restore 4% max HP (does not count the Monster Passive’s effect). For every instance this triggers, further increase this effect by 0.8% flat (additive, max 4% total), resets when it stops triggering consecutively. If HP is greater than 75%, also gain “Let My Name Rock Earth”. At the end of the Scene, gain 1 Strength for every 25% missing HP next Scene. Gain 1 Shin (心) - The Gray Cinderella upon restoring every 24% max HP total (counts while at max HP, but reduces the count to only 25% of the healed value when at max HP). Spend 5 Shin (心) - The Gray Cinderella to gain 1 Mang (望) - The Gray Cinderella

BattleEffectText.Name: The Ashen Monster
BattleEffectText.Desc: At the start of the Scene, when this unit has not taken any damage to their HP the previous Scene, restore 8% max HP. For every instance this triggers, further increase the effect by 1% flat (max, 10% total). If HP is greater than 60%, also gain “Let My Name Shake Heaven and Earth”. At the end of the Scene, gain 1 Damage Up for every 15% missing HP and 1 Strength for every 20% missing HP next Scene

BattleEffectText.Name: Shield
BattleEffectText.Desc: Whenever taking damage, shield will be reduced instead of your HP. Current shield HP: {0}
